model_name: WNBA Market-Anchor Totals Adjustment Model v2
hypothesis: The sportsbook closing total is the best baseline forecast for WNBA totals, but rolling team structure, pace, and schedule features contain incremental information about the residual error around that line. A model trained on actual_total minus closing_total can identify stable game-total adjustments with cleaner calibration than a raw total prediction model.
reason_for_v2: Expanded closing-line history removes the sparse-data blocker that invalidated the first anchor build.
